ConvertFile.description: This operation converts a file to another format. The list of supported conversions can be found at https://aka.ms/onedriveconversions

ConvertFileByPath.description: This operation converts a file to another format using the path. The list of supported conversions can be found at https://aka.ms/onedriveconversions

CopyDriveFile.description: This operation copies a file within OneDrive.

CopyDriveFileByPath.description: This operation copies a file within OneDrive by path.

CopyFile.description: This operation uploads a file from a URL to OneDrive.

CreateShareLinkByPathV2.description: This operation creates a share link for a file using the path.

CreateShareLinkV2.description: This operation creates a share link for a file.

ExtractFolderV2.description: This operation extracts an archive file into a folder (example: .zip). Maximum archive size is 50 MB and 100 files inside.

FindFiles.description: This operation finds files within a folder using search or name pattern match.

FindFilesByPath.displayName: Find files in folder by path
FindFilesByPath.description: This operation finds files within a folder by path using search or name pattern match.

GetFileContent.description: This operation gets the content of a file.

GetFileContentByPath.description: This operation gets the content of a file using the path.

GetFileMetadata.description: This operation gets the metadata for a file.

GetFileMetadataByPath.description: This operation gets the metadata of a file using the path.

GetFileThumbnail.description: This operation gets the thumbnail of a file. The thumbnail will only be valid for 6 hours.

ListFolderV2.description: This operation gets the list of files and subfolders in a folder.

ListRootFolder.description: This operation gets the list of files and subfolders in the root folder.

MoveFile.description: This operation moves or renames a file.

MoveFileByPath.displayName: Move or rename a file using path
MoveFileByPath.description: This operation moves or renames a file using the path.

OnNewFilesV2.displayName: When a file is created (properties only)
OnNewFilesV2.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new file is created in a folder.  Files moved within OneDrive are not considered new files.

OnNewFileV2.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new file is created in a folder. Files larger than 50 MB will be skipped and not returned by this trigger. Files moved within OneDrive are not considered new files.

OnUpdatedFilesV2.displayName: When a file is modified (properties only)
OnUpdatedFilesV2.description: This operation triggers a flow when a file is modified in a folder.

OnUpdatedFileV2.description: This operation triggers a flow when a file is modified in a folder. Files larger than 50 MB will be skipped and not returned by this trigger.
